rule_metadata.name: ldapsearch_ad
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'ldapsearch-ad' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule ldapsearch_ad
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'ldapsearch-ad' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "ldapsearch-ad"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\s\-\-server\s.{0,1000}\s\-\-type\spass\-pols/
		$string2 = " --type asreproast"
		$string3 = " --type search-spn"
		$string4 = /\/ldapsearch\-ad\.git/
		$string5 = /ldapsearchad\.py/
		$string6 = /ldapsearch\-ad\.py/

	condition:
		any of them
}
